description: Two civilizations meet at a trade boundary with no shared language. The Aurelith offer abundant energy in exchange for the right to mine deep minerals from the Khemat world. But the Khemat regard those minerals as the resting-bones of their ancestors, and disturbing them demands ritual permission and lasting safeguards. Reach an accord that settles ALL of the following, coining shared words as needed: (1) how much energy is given and in what form, (2) which depth of minerals may be touched and which are forbidden, (3) what ritual or permission must precede any mining, (4) what ongoing safeguard or monitoring protects the sacred sites, and (5) how long the accord lasts. Both sides must explicitly agree before it is final.
